FunctionBody: let LookupFunction = (SeverityLevelInput: string) { let SeverityLevelTypes = dynamic({'alert': 'Low', 'crit': 'High', 'critical': 'High', 'debug': 'Informational', 'emerg': 'High', 'emergency': 'High', 'err': 'Medium', 'error': 'Medium', 'info': 'Informational', 'notice': 'Informational', 'warn': 'Low', 'warning': 'Low'}); let SeverityLevelLookup = SeverityLevelTypes[tostring(SeverityLevelInput)]; case(isnotempty(SeverityLevelLookup), SeverityLevelLookup, '') }; LookupFunction(SeverityLevelInput);
